Package com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation

Class DelegatedTaskSearchDescriptor

java.lang.Object
com.bonitasoft.engine.bpm.delegation.DelegatedTaskSearchDescriptor
public final class DelegatedTaskSearchDescriptor extends Object
Search descriptor keys for DelegationAPI.searchDelegatedTasks(org.bonitasoft.engine.search.SearchOptions).

Each constant names a field that can be used as a filter or sort key on a DelegatedTask search.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    DELEGATE_ID
    The delegate (the user the tasks were delegated to).
    static final String
    DELEGATOR_ID
    The delegator (the user whose tasks are surfaced through delegation).
    static final String
    DUE_DATE
    The task due date (epoch millis), or 0 when the task has no due date.
    static final String
    ID
    The identifier of the human task.
    static final String
    PARENT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_ID
    The identifier of the immediate parent process instance the task belongs to.
    static final String
    PRIORITY
    The task priority.
    static final String
    PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID
    The identifier of the process definition the task's immediate parent process instance was started from.
    static final String
    REACHED_STATE_DATE
    The timestamp (epoch millis) when the task reached its current state.
    static final String
    ROOT_PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID
    The identifier of the root process definition — the definition of the top-level process instance.
    static final String
    ROOT_PROCESS_DISPLAY_NAME
    The display name of the root process.
    static final String
    ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_ID
    The identifier of the root process instance (the top-level case).
    static final String
    ROOT_PROCESS_NAME
    The technical name of the root process — the value matched against a DelegationRule's process whitelist.

  • Field Details

    • ID

      public static final String ID
      The identifier of the human task.
      See Also:

    • DELEGATOR_ID

      public static final String DELEGATOR_ID
      The delegator (the user whose tasks are surfaced through delegation).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DELEGATE_ID

      public static final String DELEGATE_ID
      The delegate (the user the tasks were delegated to).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID

      public static final String PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID
      The identifier of the process definition the task's immediate parent process instance was started from.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROOT_PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID

      public static final String ROOT_PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID
      The identifier of the root process definition — the definition of the top-level process instance. Equal to PROCESS_DEFINITION_ID when the task is not nested in a subprocess.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PARENT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_ID

      public static final String PARENT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_ID
      The identifier of the immediate parent process instance the task belongs to.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_ID

      public static final String ROOT_PROCESS_INSTANCE_ID
      The identifier of the root process instance (the top-level case).
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROOT_PROCESS_DISPLAY_NAME

      public static final String ROOT_PROCESS_DISPLAY_NAME
      The display name of the root process.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • ROOT_PROCESS_NAME

      public static final String ROOT_PROCESS_NAME
      The technical name of the root process — the value matched against a DelegationRule's process whitelist. Independent of ROOT_PROCESS_DISPLAY_NAME.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • PRIORITY

      public static final String PRIORITY
      The task priority.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • DUE_DATE

      public static final String DUE_DATE
      The task due date (epoch millis), or 0 when the task has no due date.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

    • REACHED_STATE_DATE

      public static final String REACHED_STATE_DATE
      The timestamp (epoch millis) when the task reached its current state. Approximates the task's creation date for tasks still in their initial state, but is updated on every state transition (e.g. READY → EXECUTING). The engine does not expose a dedicated creation timestamp on flow nodes.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values
